query:
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, status, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId, customerName
FROM services 
WHERE monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
  AND (billingPeriod IS NULL OR billingPeriod != 'archived')
  AND status != 'terminated'
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT externalId, planName, provider, status, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId, customerName
FROM services 
WHERE monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
  AND (billingPeriod IS NULL OR billingPeriod != 'archived')
  AND status != 'terminated'
LIMIT 20;
